etymology: Freya = Norse goddess of love; Holm = small island
wordplay_note: Love on a small island — isolated beauty
card_description: Freya Holm (meaning "Freya = Norse goddess of love; Holm = small island") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Lies Inc.*. Rachmael's love interest and companion. Name note: Love on a small island — isolated beauty. Romance as motivation for truth-seeking. First appears in *Lies Inc.*.

reference.etymology: Freya = Norse goddess of love; Holm = small island
